signals.headline: Ripple's Quantum-Resistant XRPL Roadmap Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ripple's Quantum-Resistant XRPL Roadmap Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ripple announced a detailed four-phase roadmap on April 20, 2026, to make the XRP Ledger (XRPL) quantum-ready by 2028, with Phase 3 testing hybrid signatures in H2 2026, positioning XRPL ahead of Bitcoin and Ethereum.[2][4] This proactive step against quantum threats could drive institutional adoption and move prediction
